task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus using the administrator account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus interface is visible, and the user profile or login screen indicates the use of the 'administrator' account.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Add Technician' form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Technician' or 'Add Technician' form is open within the ServiceDesk Plus administrative settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct name and email for the technician.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields show 'James Wilson' for the name and 'james.wilson@company.local' for the email address.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enabled login access and entered the correct login name and password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Login details are being configured with 'jwilson' in the Login Name field and characters entered in the Password field.

task_completion.description: Verify the new technician was successfully saved and added to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success confirmation message is displayed, or 'James Wilson' is visible in the list of configured technicians.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with ServiceDesk Plus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus application, not a terminal window executing scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the information into the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry occurs within the styled web forms of ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus, not in a generic text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the task requirements into a text editor to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no open text editors (e.g., Notepad, gedit) displaying the technician details as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new technician must be created with Name: 'James Wilson', Email: 'james.wilson@company.local', Login Name: 'jwilson', and Password: 'ServiceDesk@2024'. The agent must access the system using the credentials username: 'administrator' and password: 'administrator'.
